scripts.test:qa:legacy:entidades: npm run test:qa:entity:transportista && npm run test:qa:entity:cliente && npm run test:qa:entity:vehiculo && npm run test:qa:entity:conductor
scripts.test:qa:legacy:viajes: npm run test:qa:legacy:planificar && npm run test:qa:legacy:asignar && npm run test:qa:legacy:finalizar
scripts.test:qa:flow:setup-to-prefactura: npm run test:qa:legacy:setup && npm run test:qa:legacy:contratos && npm run test:qa:legacy:viajes && npm run test:qa:legacy:prefactura
scripts.test:qa:flow:entidades-to-prefactura: npm run test:qa:legacy:entidades && npm run test:qa:legacy:contratos && npm run test:qa:legacy:viajes && npm run test:qa:legacy:prefactura
scripts.test:qa:trip:full-flow: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env ENV=QA HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-qa playwright test tests/e2e/suites/prefactura-crear-e2e.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.test:demo:legacy:entidades: npm run test:demo:entity:transportista && npm run test:demo:entity:cliente && npm run test:demo:entity:vehiculo && npm run test:demo:entity:conductor
scripts.test:demo:legacy:viajes: npm run test:demo:legacy:planificar && npm run test:demo:legacy:asignar && npm run test:demo:legacy:finalizar
scripts.test:demo:flow:entidades-to-prefactura: npm run test:demo:legacy:entidades && npm run test:demo:legacy:contratos && npm run test:demo:legacy:viajes && npm run test:demo:legacy:prefactura
scripts.test:demo:trip:full-flow: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env ENV=DEMO HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-demo playwright test tests/e2e/suites/prefactura-crear-e2e.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.clean: npm run clean:allure && npm run clean:results
scripts.clean:results: rimraf playwright-report playwright-report-qa playwright-report-demo test-results test-results-qa test-results-demo
scripts.clean:allure: rimraf allure-report-qa allure-report-demo allure-results-qa allure-results-demo allure-results
scripts.run:qa:setup-to-prefactura: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:qa:flow:setup-to-prefactura && npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.run:qa:entidades-to-prefactura: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:qa:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.run:qa:e2e: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:qa:trip:full-flow && npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.run:qa:entity:capacidad: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env ENV=QA HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-qa playwright test tests/e2e/modules/01-entidades/transport/capacidades-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.run:demo:entity:unidadnegocio: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env ENV=DEMO HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-demo playwright test tests/e2e/modules/00-config/unidadnegocio-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.run:demo:entity:tipocarga: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env ENV=DEMO HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-demo playwright test tests/e2e/modules/00-config/tipocarga-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.run:qa:entity:ruta: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env ENV=QA HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-qa playwright test tests/e2e/modules/00-config/ruta-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:qa
scripts.run:demo:entity:ruta: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env ENV=DEMO HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-demo playwright test tests/e2e/modules/00-config/ruta-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.run:demo:entity:capacidad: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env ENV=DEMO HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-demo playwright test tests/e2e/modules/01-entidades/transport/capacidades-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.run:demo:entidades-to-prefactura: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:demo:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && npm run allure:serve:demo
scripts.run:all:qa: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:qa:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:qa:trip:full-flow && npm run allure:generate:qa && npm run allure:open:qa
scripts.run:all:demo: npm run clean:allure:demo && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:demo:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && cross-env HEADLESS=false npm run test:demo:trip:full-flow && npm run allure:generate:demo && npm run allure:open:demo
scripts.test:all: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:qa:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && npm run test:qa:trip:full-flow && npm run test:demo:flow:entidades-to-prefactura && npm run test:demo:trip:full-flow && npm run allure:generate:qa && npm run allure:generate:demo
scripts.run:qa:ultimamilla:pedido-crear: npm run clean:allure:qa && cross-env ENV=QA HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-qa playwright test tests/e2e/modules/ultimamilla/pedido-crear.test.ts --headed --trace on ; npm run allure:serve:qa
